selected: Selected six repos with direct AI/coding-agent workflow relevance, concrete raw evidence, source links, and verified stars >= 100.

Repeated GitHub AI 项目 picks from those days were excluded unless substantially new; Herdr was mentioned in a prior HN discussion but not previously used as a GitHub AI 项目 pick, and today's packaged evidence is its GitHub Trending repo signal.
